plugins.description: Research-augmented fork of obra/superpowers. Default-on research phase at entry-point stages, narrow freshness check on stale-artifact consumers, pure consumer ports for the rest. v0.3.0 ships 6 of 14 skills (foundation + debugging triads); 8 more pending across batches 3-5.
